Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Enforcing Settlement Agreement And General Release And Entering Judgment In Favor Of Plaintiff Ccp 6646
Off Calendar Feb-09-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF TED SAILOR'S Motion For Order Enforcing Settlement Agreement And General Release And Entering Judgment In Favor Of Plaintiff Ccp 6646

No appearance.

The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion for order enforcing settlement agreement and general release and entering judgment in favor of plaintiff" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to submit a proposed order which states that the motion is unopposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported. (302/RBU)
